zh.Linton, Hereford, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Talbot III於1183年出生在英國賀福爾布洛米亞德時，他的父親Gilbert de Talbot33歲，母親Ann Villiers31歲。他於大約1214年與Aline Basset在英國英格蘭賀福爾林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1234年4月13日之前在英國賀福爾可雷登爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Talbot III于1183年出生在英国賀福爾布洛米亞德时，他的父亲Gilbert de Talbot33岁，母亲Ann Villiers31岁。他于大约1214年与Aline Basset在英国英格兰賀福爾林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1234年4月13日之前在英国賀福爾可雷登爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Talbot III was born in 1183, in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, his father, Gilbert de Talbot, was 33 and his mother, Ann Villiers, was 31. He married Aline Basset about 1214, in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 13 April 1234, in Credenhill, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Talbot III est né en 1183, à Bromyard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Talbot, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ann Villiers, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Aline Basset environ 1214, à Linton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 13 avril 1234, à Credenhill, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Talbot III 1183 in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de Talbot 33 und seine Mutter Ann Villiers 31. Er hat um 1214 in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Aline Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 13. April 1234 in Credenhill, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Talbot III è nato il nel 1183 nel Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert de Talbot, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ann Villiers, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Aline Basset circa 1214, nel Linton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 13 aprile 1234, nel Credenhill, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Talbot IIIが1183年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブロムヤルドで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Talbotは33歳，母Ann Villiersは31歳であった。約1214年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリントンでAline Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1234年4月13日以前にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクレデンヒルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Talbot III(이)가 1183년 영국 허퍼드실르 브로미아어드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Talbot(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Villiers(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 린턴에서 Aline Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1234년 4월 13일 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 크레데힐에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Talbot III nasceu em 1183, em Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Talbot, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ann Villiers, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Aline Basset aproximadamente 1214, em Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 13 de abril de 1234, em Credenhill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Talbot III родился в 1183 г. в местности бромярд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Talbot было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Villiers, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Aline Basset около 1214 г. в местности линтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 13 апрель 1234 г. в местности креденилл, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Talbot III nació en 1183, en Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Talbot, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ann Villiers, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Aline Basset aproximadamente 1214, en Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 13 de abril de 1234, en Credenhill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
